summary.zh-CN: 本版本修复运行时更新后内置技能缺失的问题。
summary.en-US: This release keeps built-in skills available after runtime updates.

title.zh-CN: 运行时更新保留内置技能

body.zh-CN: 更新包不再删除内置技能说明和引用资料，应用更新后仍可使用完整的内置技能。
body.en-US: Update bundles no longer remove built-in skill instructions or referenced assets, so the complete skill set remains available after applying an update.

title.zh-CN: 构建阶段校验技能资产
title.en-US: Skill assets are verified during builds

body.zh-CN: 首次部署和缓存恢复都会核对内置技能文件，缺失或内容不一致会直接阻止不完整的更新包发布。
body.en-US: Fresh deployments and restored caches verify built-in skill files and prevent incomplete runtime bundles from being published.

title.en-US: No migration or skill reinstall required

body.zh-CN: 现有 NPM 安装可以直接通过 stable 通道升级；用户自行安装的技能不受影响。
body.en-US: Existing npm installations can update directly through the stable channel, and user-installed skills are unaffected.

body.zh-CN: 本次 patch 面向 NPM stable 更新链路，不包含新的桌面安装包。
body.en-US: This patch targets the npm stable update path and does not include a new desktop installer.
